text: C3;Kitchen-remodeled-one to five years ago;Bathrooms- remodeled-one to five years ago;The improvements are well maintained and feature limited physical depreciation due to normal wear and tear. Some components, but not every major building component, may be updated or recently rehabilitated. The structure has been well maintained. All utilities are on and appear to be working properly. The appraiser has adhered to ANSI standards in measuring the subject property.
